summary: The code-tidying catalog is the first major part of the study graph.
The management guidance is the second major part of the study graph.
The theory section supplies the design-economics frame behind tidying decisions.
Guard clauses are one of the small code-tidying practices.
Dead-code deletion is treated as a small structural cleanup.
Symmetry is a code-shaping tidy that makes similar code read similarly.
Introducing a new interface over an old routine is a code-tidying move.
Reading order belongs to local readability-oriented tidying.
Cohesion-oriented layout belongs to the code-tidying catalog.
Moving declaration and initialization together is a local code tidy.
Explaining variables are part of the code-tidying practice set.
Explaining constants are part of the code-tidying practice set.
Explicit parameters are part of the code-tidying practice set.
Grouping similar code is part of the code-tidying practice set.
Helper extraction is part of the code-tidying practice set.
Collecting one pile is part of the code-tidying practice set.
Explaining comments are part of the code-tidying practice set.
Deleting redundant comments is part of the code-tidying practice set.
Separating tidying from behavior change is a management rule.
Chained tidying is a management and sequencing topic.
Tidying batch size is a management topic.
Tidying rhythm is a management topic.
Untangling mixed edits is a management topic.
Timing the tidy is a management decision.
Elements and relations are part of the theory section.
Structure and behavior are part of the theory section.
Economic theory is part of the theory section.
Time value is part of the theory section.
Options are part of the theory section.
Reversible structural change is part of the theory section.
Coupling is part of the theory section.
Constantine's equivalence is part of the theory section.
Decoupling is part of the theory section.
Cohesion is part of the theory section.
Early exits can make the main reading path clearer by moving exceptional cases out of the core flow.
Removing unused fragments lowers noise before aligning similar code into a clearer shape.
A symmetric shape makes it easier to introduce a desired interface and migrate callers consistently.
A wrapper or adapter can expose the boundary where hidden inputs should become explicit parameters.
Placing related code together can reveal a helper-sized subtask worth extracting.
Keeping declaration and initialization close makes named intermediate values easier to understand.
Both moves replace opaque expressions with names that carry intent, one for computed values and one for literals.
Gathering similar code makes the repeated subtask visible enough to extract as a helper.
Collecting related fragments into one pile can be an intermediate step before a clean helper extraction.
Intentful comments and redundant comments are distinguished so comments remain useful rather than noisy.
The workflow rule mirrors the theory distinction between structure changes and behavior changes.
A chain of small tidies needs a conscious batch-size decision to avoid drifting beyond the current goal.
Batch size and rhythm must be balanced between smooth progress and inexpensive review feedback.
Tangled edits are a warning that structural and behavioral work may need to be split again.
The timing decision depends on an economic tradeoff between current cost and future value.
Economics evaluates structural changes by how they affect the cost of future behavior changes.
Economic reasoning includes the timing of costs and benefits.
Time value and uncertainty explain why preserving future options can be worth a small present cost.
Reversible structure changes preserve options because they reduce the cost of changing direction.
Reversible structural changes can reduce the risk created by tightly coupled decisions.
Coupling matters because change cost is central to the cost of software.
If software cost follows change cost, decoupling is justified when it lowers expected change cost.
Reducing coupling often creates new boundaries, so cohesion must guide where those boundaries belong.
The theory of cohesion explains why related code placement can be a useful tidy.
The source quality caveat applies to the whole graph because the private input was OCR-derived and not fully reviewed.
Practice summaries should be used as paraphrased guidance rather than as exact source wording.
작게 수행하고 복구 가능성을 남기는 판단은 죽은 코드 삭제를 더 안전한 정리로 만든다.
변동성이 클수록 선택권의 가치가 커진다는 관점은 설계 옵션 이론을 뒷받침한다.
되돌릴 수 있는 구조 변경을 선호하는 결정은 구조 변경을 학습 가능한 작은 선택으로 만든다.
naming clarity는 code tidying 범위의 작은 이해 개선이다.
guarded flow tidy는 guard clauses와 함께 핵심 흐름을 드러낸다.
interface narrowing은 새 인터페이스를 만들 때 호출 표면을 좁히는 판단이다.
tidy-before decision은 행동 변경 전 이해 비용을 낮추는 관리 선택이다.
tidy-after decision은 행동 변경 후 생긴 지식을 구조에 반영하는 선택이다.
coupling signal은 함께 바뀌는 요소를 관찰해 결합을 판단하게 한다.
cohesion signal은 같은 변경 이유가 가까이 있는지 판단하는 기준이다.
tidy batch size는 정리 변경을 리뷰와 롤백 가능한 크기로 제한한다.
cosmetic drift risk는 의미 없는 정리 확대가 변경 목적을 흐릴 수 있음을 경고한다.
option expiry는 정리 선택의 시간 가치 변화를 option 이론으로 해석한다.
tidy-before와 tidy-after는 같은 정리라도 행동 변경 전후의 정보 상태가 다르다.
batch size가 커질수록 cosmetic drift risk를 더 엄격히 봐야 한다.
Behavior Change Separation Boundary는 Behavior Change Separation Decision를 다음 행동보다 먼저 다룬다.
Behavior Change Separation Decision는 Behavior Change Separation Risk를 판단 근거를 보강한다.
Behavior Change Separation Risk는 Behavior Change Separation Workflow를 후속 판단을 가능하게 한다.
Behavior Change Separation Workflow는 Behavior Change Separation Testing를 비용이나 위험을 낮춘다.
Behavior Change Separation Testing는 Behavior Change Separation Boundary를 행동 변경과 구조 변경을 분리한다.
